name: ml-course-platform
description: Machine Learning Course Platform with Dashboard and Backend API

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix dashboard" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.build: python prepare_docs.py && pip install mkdocs-material mkdocs-minify-plugin pymdown-extensions && mkdocs build --site-dir dashboard/public/site && npm run build --prefix dashboard
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --prefix dashboard" "npm run start --prefix backend"
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix dashboard && npm run lint --prefix backend
